_comment: Extraction-quality eval fixtures. Each case captures a real post's signals (as they arrive on RawPost) plus the places we expect Claude to extract. Run before/after prompt (#14) or model-routing (#18) changes to catch silent regressions. Replace/extend these seed cases with 10-15 real IG/YT posts. 'expected_places' = names that MUST appear (matched by normalize_name); 'forbidden_places' = names that must NOT appear (generic/area-type junk or incidental mentions you don't want).

post.caption: Best bindaetteok in Seoul! Gwangjang Market never misses 🥞

top_comments.text: the mung bean pancakes here are unreal
